race.comment: LOOK AT MEGO (8) finished 14th last start over 1400m at Taree after racing on the pace for much of the way. Will be handy in the run and should prove hard to run down. SPRING BLOSSOM (9) wasted no time getting off the mark on debut over 1200m at Moruya two weeks ago. Sure to be further improved and can make it back-to-back wins. GRAND VOILE (12) showed early speed from an outside draw last time and led for much of the way before weakening to finish 11th, beaten 7 lengths, over 1400m at Taree. Expected to feature. CHARMED DESTINY (4) missed the placings when resuming two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1400m at Taree, beaten 3 lengths. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run.
